criteria.reason: Production UI/API smoke created a document agent through dialog builder and verified builder/setup metadata.
Datahub catalog includes connected text and uploaded file sources with ready state and preview.
Run review, feedback version creation, diff, rollback, and activation were verified.
Generic documents/email/tables/reviews smoke verified approval boundary and no external dispatch.
Production fixture cleanup verified zero remaining rows and service health returned 200 OK.

commands_run: ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app ... python -' < scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_generic_boundaries.py
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T postgres psql ... cleanup/verify ...'
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I -sS http://localhost:8000 | head -5'
